case_title: GEORGE CHEUNG VS. HO II SONG

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-01-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-01-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. 506. PLAINTIFF GEORGE CHEUNG IS PRESENT, ASSISTED BY NON COURT CERTIFIED CANTONESE INTERPRETER DALIA LIANG. DEFENDANT HO SONG II IS PRESENT, ASSISTED BY NON COURT CERTIFIED KOREAN INTERPRETER SEUNGJU KIM . CLERK R. SAHATJIAN ADMINISTERED THE INTERPRETER'S OATH TO DALIA LIANG AND SEUNGJU KIM. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-01-2018 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHEUNG, GEORGE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SONG, HO II MR. CHEUNG'S EVIDENCE MAKES CLEAR THAT HIS WORK INCLUDED CONSTRUCTION AND IMPROVEMENTS (E.G. INSTALLING SINKS AND ELECTRICAL OUTLETS) FOR WHICH A LICENSE WAS REQUIRED. THE HANDYMAN EXCEPTION (BUS & PROF CODE 7048) DOES NOT APPLY TO JOBS EXCEEDING $500.00. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,541.23 (SC-100 STAMPED: BY FAX) FILED BY CHEUNG, GEORGE AS TO DEFENDANT SONG, HO II ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-06-2018 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ORDER RE: CONTINUANCE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE 75.00 SERVED JUL-09-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SONG, HO II

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-06-2018 - CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION TO OCT-01-2018 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. THE PARTIES SHALL APPEAR FOR FURTHER HEARING BEFORE DECISION. MR. CHEUNG SHALL PRESENT TESTIMONY OR EVIDENCE IF AVAILABLE THAT HE IS A LICENSED CONTRACTOR. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT, ASSISTED BY CANTONESE INTERPRETER DALIA LIANG. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT, ASSISTED BY KOREAN INTERPRETER SEUNGJU KIM. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: J. BERTELSEN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JAN-02-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED
